reviews.comment: The services in the petrol station are excelent. There are traffics lights that let you get out without problem, in the rush hours. You can find near a college, hospitals, the zoo. Also, you can have a nice view of part of the city. In the cafeteria and minimarket, you can find a lof of options to drink and eat

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience and thoughts about our petrol station! We are thrilled to hear that you found our services to be excellent, and that the traffic lights were helpful during rush hour. It's also great to know that our location near the college, hospitals, and zoo was convenient for you, and that you enjoyed the view of the city. We take pride in offering a wide range of food and drink options at our cafeteria and minimarket, and we're glad to hear that you found plenty of choices. Thank you again for your review, and we hope to see you again soon!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2561952699267032562/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNUlMR1VnEAE
